summary: Researched existing PatternKey infrastructure (12 input features: 4 numeric + 8-class one-hot), ProofTrace.height regression target, BimodalDataset integration, and SuccessPatterns.lean heuristic baseline. Designed MLP with hidden_sizes=[2048,1024,512,256] (2.78M params), GELU+LayerNorm+Dropout, Softplus output, Huber loss. Planned value.py, value_trainer.py, train_value_network.py, and tests.

artifacts.summary: Full research report covering input encoding (log1p+one-hot, D_IN=12), architecture sizing (2.78M default), training design (Huber loss, CurriculumSampler, collate_fn), Lean baseline analysis (suggestedDepth heuristic), and implementation file plan
